title: Cakemon
description: A new Cobblemon modpack with a focus on game feel and performance.
body:
Cakemon aims to give you a immersive experience in Cobblemon!

Cakemon is well optimized and has many Visual/Sound Enhancing mods in it to immersise you in this world of Cobblemon.

Notable Features:
- 🔨 Explore: With our World Generation you should see breathtaking sights everywhere
- 🏡 Build: Many Building Mods are includes so you can build everything you can imagine
- 🛠️ Technology: No big Sci-Fi, only Steampunk/Vanilla+ Tech so you can intergrate it into your Builds
- 🌍 Seasons: Let the World feel always fresh with 4 Seasons
- 🛜 Multiplayer Compatibility: This Modpack includes Mods that will spice up your Multiplayer Journey
